infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: GoHustlr needs access to your photos so you can set a profile picture and add photos to gigs, chats, and completed jobs.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: GoHustlr needs camera access so you can take photos for your profile, gigs, chats, and completed jobs.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: GoHustlr needs microphone access when you record video.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GoHustlr uses your location to show gigs near you and sort them by distance.

plugins.photosPermission: GoHustlr needs access to your photos so you can set a profile picture and add photos to gigs, chats, and completed jobs.
plugins.cameraPermission: GoHustlr needs camera access so you can take photos for your profile, gigs, chats, and completed jobs.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GoHustlr uses your location to show gigs near you and sort them by distance.
